  • Course Instructor Template

Course Instructor Template

(22 Fields, 8 Collected, Delimited)

Target Table: CRSE_INSTRUCT

Load Sequence/Dependencies
COURSE
STAFF

Template Description​

The Course Instructor Template is used to identify the instructor(s) of each section of every course reported in the Course Template. The Course Instructor Template should be submitted in a cumulative fashion so that the primary instructor associated with each section and each course are reported for the entire school year. All active teachers and teachers on long term leave should have course instructor records. Teachers who are terminated during the school year are not reported unless the course they were teaching also ended with their departure. Retired teachers may be reported if they taught a portion of the class prior to their retirement. Long term substitutes are reported when they are the teacher of record, or when they are a professional or temporary professional employee.

Template Specifications​

1 - SUBMITTING AUN​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 9

The unique, 9-digit AUN assigned by the PDE.

Sample / Valid Value:

All LEA and School Numbers can be found on the EdNA website

123456789

eScholar Name: DISTRICT CODE

2 - SCHOOL NUMBER​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 4

The PDE defined 4-digit code identifying the school.

Sample / Valid Value:

All LEA and School Numbers can be found on the EdNA website

1234

eScholar Name: LOCATION CODE

3 - SCHOOL YEAR DATE​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 10

A single date (June 30), the last day of the current school year indicating the whole school year.

Sample / Valid Value:

2024-06-30

4-7​

Fields not Collected. Must be delimited in template file.

8 - PRIMARY INSTRUCTOR ID​

RequiredUpdateableMax Length: 7

A unique identifier for all instructors, regardless of whether they hold a PA certificate; the 7-digit Professional Personnel ID (PPID). Professional personnel can obtain a PPID from the TIMS system. Helpful information is found at the PDE website > Educators > Certification.

Sample / Valid Value:

0123456

9-16​

Fields not Collected. Must be delimited in template file.

17 - SUPPLEMENTARY COURSE DIFFERENTIATOR​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 2

This field is used to help make a course unique where the same COURSE CODE is offered in more than one-time period during the school year. This field will represent the general span of time in which a course and its sections are offered.

Business Rules:

This field should match the Supplementary Course Differentiator (Semester) column in the COURSE Table for the relevant course code record.

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix O for a complete list of valid values.

18​

Field not Collected. Must be delimited in template file.

19 - COURSE CODE LONG​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 12

The unique, local, LEA-specific COURSE CODE.

Business Rules:
  • Courses may have multiple sections.
  • Each course should have a single COURSE CODE LONG.
  • Do not assign separate course codes to sections of the same course.

20 - PRIMARY INSTRUCTION LANGUAGE CODE​

OptionalUpdateableMax Length: 4

The primary language in which a course is taught.

Business Rules:

This field should be left blank for courses taught in US English.

Sample / Valid Value:

See Appendix J for a complete list of valid values.

21​

Field not Collected. Must be delimited in template file.

22 - SECTION CODE LONG​

RequiredKeyMax Length: 25

Class section number assigned by LEA to identify distinct classes.

Business Rules:

This field should be the local section number only.

Rules​

See the Rules Section of the Template Domain
